meta.home.title: Les Merveilles de Mimi — Artisan Pastries
meta.home.desc: Exceptional handcrafted pastries since 2012. Traditional cakes, pistachio specialties and gift boxes.
hero.subtitle: Traditional Cakes & Fine Pastries
story.label: Our Story
story.body1: For more than sixteen years, Les Merveilles de Mimi has crafted traditional pastries and exquisite cakes, blending heritage, elegance and artisan expertise.
story.body2: Each piece is handcrafted with passion and attention to detail, transforming every celebration into an unforgettable moment.
story.quote: The art of pastry is the art of making moments precious.

footer.tagline: Each creation is crafted with passion, tradition and refinement for over 16 years.
